message:
feat(search-core): enhance embedding job queue and two-tier search

Major improvements to the embedding job infrastructure and search
execution pipeline for better reliability and performance.

Embedding queue changes:
- Switch dedup from HashMap to HashSet for simpler key tracking
- Support deduplication across both main and retry queues
- Add next_attempt_at field for proper retry backoff scheduling
- Improve queue stats tracking (pending_count, retry_count)
- Better handling of stale dedup keys

Two-tier search improvements:
- Add planner module for query execution strategy
- Auto-init semantic embedder with fallback to hash embedder
- Model tier (Fast/Quality) selection logic
- Better integration with IndexLifecycle

Model embedders:
- FastEmbed and Model2Vec embedders updated for new interface
- Consistent error handling across embedding providers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
